blogs.name: Dataiku Blog
blogs.bio: AI governance, enterprise AI platform deployment, MLOps, analytics, agent orchestration.

tweets.text: Sovereignty isn't where your AI runs. It's whether it answers to you.
tweets.summary: Last week, a government order took the world's best AI model offline in hours. No one deleted it and no server failed. A single directive put the most capable model on the market out of reach for everyone not a citizen of one country.

tweets.text: What is an AI orchestration layer? Architecture, benefits, and enterprise use cases
tweets.summary: AI investments are multiplying, but coordination between models, agents, and data pipelines remains an afterthought in most enterprises. tweets.text: Enterprise AI transformation: how leading organizations are redesigning operations around AI
tweets.summary:
